MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ROSS DRESS FOR LESS, INC., MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for summary adjudication granted in part and denied in part. Motion granted as to 1st cause of action for declaratory relief. Spreadsheet, Exhibit C to Taheri declaration, not admissible. Evidence Code section 119. The plain meaning of 6.1.3(d) read in context of the entire section supports the contention that the lease provided no time limitation on the Secondary Reduced Occupancy Period (SROP). Defendant's extrinsic evidence does not demonstrate that this provision is capable of a different interpretation. The first 120 days of the period between 12/1/05 and 6/15/06 (Ace Hardware) do not qualify as an exempted discontinuance. Bi-Rite did not close for any reason which would qualify as an exempted discontinuance. Ace Hardware did not close due to repairs/remodeling because it did not open until 6/15/06. Ace Hardware did not vacate for a casualty, taking, or repairs/remodeling. 6.1.3(f). Motion denied as to the 3rd cause of action for restitution as a triable issue of fact exists. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-06-2010 Continued To May-25-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
